Internal Memorandum — Strictly Confidential — PDPL/MNPI
To: Board Compliance Committee, Najm Oasis Logistics PJSC (Trade Licence GNFC-PJSC-2049-338721; TRN 109204567890123)
From: Ms. Rana Al Jouri, General Counsel, legal@najmoasis.test, +971 52 123 4489
Subject: Pre-IPO private placement to Rimal Family Office SPC and listing on Abara Securities Exchange; PDPL controls and market-abuse safeguards under FSCD Code
The draft price range of AED 4.20–4.60 and Q2 revenue update (AED 147m vs prior internal guidance AED 120m) are non-public and market-sensitive; restrict access to Deal Room GNFC-DR-11 and apply clean-teams for financial model tabs.
Named contact for bookbuilding: Mr. Hadi Al Mansoor (CFO), Emirates ID 784-1985-6543210-2; UAE Passport U12977543; mobile +971 50 246 9130; hadi.almansoor@najmoasis.test.
Escrow details for cornerstone subscription: IBAN AE12 3456 7890 1234 5678 901 at Desert Crescent Bank PJSC; do not circulate beyond the private placement list.
Registered office for notices: GNFC, Tower 9, Level 21, Suite 2104, Al Dahana District, Emirate of Noor.
KYC note (data minimisation): Mr. Hadi self-reported family-origin as “Al-Sahili” for source-of-wealth context; retain only in restricted KYC folder and exclude from board packs.
Public Enquiry Line 800 0000 appears on the intake sheet; this is a generic helpline and not personal data for PDPL processing.
Form field observed: “Passport No.: __________” on a scanned template; treat as a blank label, not an identifier.
An unverified placeholder appears for a contractor: Emirates ID 784-2001-0000000-0; mark invalid/pending and exclude from processing until independently validated.
Counterparty entity details for the term sheet: Rimal Family Office SPC (GNFC–SPC–6201–117203); contact rimal.deals@rfo.test; role-only sign-off “Operations Manager” noted—request named signatory before acceptance.
Until the market disclosure notice is published by the exchange, trading windows remain closed for insiders; circulate wall-crossing confirmations and refresh insider lists within 24 hours.
Data handling: apply PDPL Art. 10 lawful basis (contract/pre-contract) for investor onboarding; pseudonymise Emirates ID and passport numbers in working trackers and redact home addresses in board materials.
Regulatory workflow: file the listing intent and cleansing timeline with the FSCD and the GNFC listings department; maintain an audit trail of all MNPI recipients and acknowledgments.
Please route any queries to compliance@najmoasis.test; urgent matters may be escalated to +971 58 777 0421.
